fields.name: connection
fields.title: Chidori Connection
fields.description: The Chidori connection to connect to call create MV.

fields.name: incortaConnection
fields.title: Incorta Connection
fields.description: The Incorta connection to connect to call schema load.

fields.name: table
fields.title: Table
fields.description: Incorta Table from which to read or write the data

fields.name: saveMode
fields.title: Save Mode
fields.description: Whether to Append, Overwrite or Error if the path Exists

fields.name: createMV
fields.title: Create MV
fields.description: Create Python MV in given schema with name in table field.

fields.name: fullLoadSchema
fields.title: Full Load Schema
fields.description: Enable the full load schema to load the data to tables/mv in the schema(Refresh).
